functions.label: FilterCountBadge
description:
Badge that displays item counts in filter options.
Shows accent color when the filter is active, hollow when inactive.

functions.label: FilterPopover
description:
`FilterPopover` component.

Base component for filter popovers with consistent styling.

Provides:
- `EuiPopover` with arrow and proper padding.
- `EuiFilterButton` with active filter badge.
- Bold title header with border.
signature: ({ title, buttonLabel, activeCount, isOpen, onToggle, onClose, panelWidth, panelMinWidth, anchorPosition, "data-test-subj": dataTestSubj, children, }:

children.label:
{
  title,
  buttonLabel,
  activeCount = 0,
  isOpen,
  onToggle,
  onClose,
  panelWidth,
  panelMinWidth,
  anchorPosition = 'downCenter',
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj,
  children,
}

returnComment: A React element containing the filter popover.

functions.label: FilterPopoverHeader
description:
Header section for filter popovers with search and selection controls.

Includes:
- Optional search box (from `EuiSelectable`).
- "X selected" count.
- "Clear filter" button.

functions.label: getCheckedState
description:
Maps filter state to `EuiSelectable` checked state.

- `'include'` → `'on'` (green checkmark).
- `'exclude'` → `'off'` (red X).
- `undefined` → `undefined` (no indicator).

functions.label: isExcludeModifier
description: Checks if the exclude modifier key is pressed (Cmd on Mac, Ctrl on Windows/Linux).

children.label: e
description: - An event object containing `metaKey` and `ctrlKey` properties.

returnComment: `true` if the exclude modifier is pressed.

functions.label: ModifierKeyTip
description: Footer component that displays the modifier key shortcut for exclude.

functions.label: parseFiltersFromQuery
description:
Chains multiple query parsers, passing cleaned text from each to the next.

Each parser receives the `searchQuery` produced by the previous parser (with
its filter syntax already stripped), and contributes its own filter values to
the accumulated result. The pipeline is pure — it does not touch React state.

children.label: queryText
description: - Raw query text from `EuiSearchBar`.

children.label: parsers
description: - Ordered array of parsers to run. Typically one parser per

returnComment:
The final cleaned `searchQuery` and merged `filters` ready to pass
to `setSearch`.

functions.label: SelectableFilterPopover
description:
`SelectableFilterPopover` component.

A reusable multi-select filter popover with include/exclude support.

Provides:
- `EuiSelectable` with search.
- Include/exclude via modifier key (Cmd/Ctrl + click).
- Filter counts with active state badges.
- Standard header with selection count and clear button.
- Standard footer with modifier key tip.
signature: <T extends object = Record<string, unknown>>({ fieldName, title, query, onChange, options, renderOption, singleSelection, isLoading, emptyMessage, noMatchesMessage, panelWidth, panelMinWidth, footerContent, "data-test-subj": dataTestSubj, }:

children.label:
{
  fieldName,
  title,
  query,
  onChange,
  options,
  renderOption,
  singleSelection = false,
  isLoading,
  emptyMessage,
  noMatchesMessage,
  panelWidth,
  panelMinWidth,
  footerContent,
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj = 'selectableFilterPopover',
}

functions.label: StandardFilterOption
description:
Standard option layout with content and optional count badge.

Include/exclude is handled by `SelectableFilterPopover`'s modifier key
tracking — no click handler is needed on individual options.

functions.label: useFieldQueryFilter
description:
Generic hook for managing include/exclude filter state.

Works with `EuiSearchBar`'s `query`/`onChange` pattern to sync filter state
with the search query text.

functions.label: useFilterPopover
description: Hook for managing filter popover open/close state.
signature: () => { isOpen: boolean; toggle: () => void; close: () => void; }
returnComment: An object containing `isOpen` state, `toggle` function, and `close` function.

functions.label: useTagQueryParser
description:
Returns a {@link QueryParser} that extracts `tag:name` and `-tag:name` clauses
from the search bar query text and maps them to `filters.tag` include/exclude lists.

Returns `null` when no tag service is registered — the toolbar skips this
parser and the query text is passed through unchanged.

Used by {@link ContentListToolbar}'s `handleSearchChange` pipeline. Register
additional parsers alongside this one (e.g. `useUserQueryParser`) to support
more filter types without modifying `handleSearchChange`.

interfaces.label: ContentListToolbarProps
description: Props for the {@link ContentListToolbar} component.

children.label: children
description: Optional children for declarative configuration via {@link Filters}.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Optional `data-test-subj` attribute for testing.

interfaces.label: FilterPopoverHeaderProps
description: Props for the {@link FilterPopoverHeader} component.

children.label: search
description: Search element from `EuiSelectable`.

children.label: activeCount
description: Number of active filter selections.

children.label: onClear
description: Callback to clear all selections.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: `data-test-subj` attribute for the clear button.

interfaces.label: FilterPopoverProps
description: Props for the {@link FilterPopover} component.

children.label: title
description: Title displayed in the popover header.

children.label: buttonLabel
description: Label displayed on the filter button (defaults to `title`).

children.label: activeCount
description: Number of active filters (shows badge on button).

children.label: isOpen
description: Whether the popover is open.

children.label: onToggle
description: Toggle popover open/closed.

children.label: onClose
description: Close the popover.

children.label: panelWidth
description: Width of the popover panel.

children.label: panelMinWidth
description: Minimum width of the popover panel.

children.label: anchorPosition
description: Anchor position for the popover.

children.label: children
description: Popover content.

interfaces.label: FiltersProps
description: Props for the {@link Filters} container component.

children.label: children
description: Filter declarative components as children.

interfaces.label: QueryParser
description:
A parser that extracts one filter dimension from an EUI search bar query string.

Parsers are chained by {@link parseFiltersFromQuery} — each receives the
cleaned query text produced by the previous parser (with earlier filter
syntax already removed), and returns cleaned text + its own parsed filters.

interfaces.label: QueryParserResult
description: Result returned by a {@link QueryParser}.

children.label: searchQuery
description:
Query text with this parser's field syntax removed.

Passed to the next parser in the chain so each parser operates on
progressively cleaner text. The final value is used as `filters.search`.

children.label: filters
description:
Filter values extracted by this parser, keyed by filter ID.

Merged into the accumulated {@link ActiveFilters} for the current query.
Return an empty object when no clauses for this filter type are present —
this clears the filter dimension, which is correct since the search bar
is the source of truth.

interfaces.label: SelectableFilterOption
description: Configuration for a selectable filter option.

children.label: key
description: Unique key for the option.

children.label: label
description: Display label.

children.label: value
description: Value to store in the query (defaults to `key` if not provided).

children.label: count
description: Item count for this option.

children.label: data
description: Custom data associated with this option.

interfaces.label: SelectableFilterPopoverProps
description: Props for the {@link SelectableFilterPopover} component.

children.label: fieldName
description: Field name in the query (e.g., `'tag'`, `'createdBy'`).

children.label: title
description: Title displayed in the popover header and button.

children.label: query
description: Query object from `EuiSearchBar`.

children.label: onChange
description: Callback when filter changes.

children.label: options
description: Options to display. See {@link SelectableFilterOption}.

children.label: renderOption
description: Render function for option content.
signature: <T>, state: { checked: "on" | "off" | undefined; isActive: boolean; }) => React.ReactNode

children.label: singleSelection
description:
Single selection mode — only one value can be selected at a time.
Also hides the modifier key tip since exclude is not supported.

children.label: isLoading
description: Whether the options are loading.

children.label: emptyMessage
description: Empty state message to display.

children.label: noMatchesMessage
description: No matches message to display.

children.label: panelWidth
description: Width of the popover panel.

children.label: panelMinWidth
description: Minimum width of the popover panel.

children.label: footerContent
description: Optional footer content (rendered below {@link ModifierKeyTip}).

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: `data-test-subj` attribute for testing.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Optional `data-test-subj` attribute for testing.

misc.label: SortFilter
description:
`SortFilter` declarative component (non-rendering).

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies that a sort dropdown should appear in the toolbar filters.
The `resolve` callback checks whether sorting is available and returns
a `SearchFilterConfig` wrapping {@link SortRenderer}, or `undefined`
to skip the filter entirely.

Sort options are configured via the provider's `sorting` config.

misc.label: SortFilterProps
description:
Props for the {@link SortFilter} declarative component.

Note: `SortFilter` is a non-rendering declarative component whose props are
parsed as attributes during filter resolution. Because `EuiSearchBar`
instantiates `custom_component` filters itself, attributes cannot be
forwarded to the underlying {@link SortRenderer}. Extend this interface
only with props the `resolve` callback can act on directly.

misc.label: TagFilter
description:
`TagFilter` declarative component (non-rendering).

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies that a tag filter dropdown should appear in the toolbar filters.
The `resolve` callback checks whether tags are available and returns
a `SearchFilterConfig` wrapping {@link TagFilterRenderer}, or `undefined`
to skip the filter entirely.

Tags must be enabled via the provider's `services.tags` configuration.

misc.label: TagFilterProps
description:
Props for the {@link TagFilter} declarative component.

Note: `TagFilter` is a non-rendering declarative component whose props are
parsed as attributes during filter resolution. Because `EuiSearchBar`
instantiates `custom_component` filters itself, attributes cannot be
forwarded to the underlying {@link TagFilterRenderer}. Extend this interface
only with props the `resolve` callback can act on directly.
